params.name: The Night Revels of Han
params.description:
On Sep 30, 961 AD, Gu Hongzhong captured his observations of the Han Xizai's night banquet in a painting.
Based on suspicions of Han Xizai, a senior official of three dynasties, Li Yu, the last ruler of the Southern Tang Dynasty, sent the painter Gu Hongzhong to investigate him. Upon learning this, Han Xizai held a luxurious banquet, pretending to be drunk and carefree to ensure his safety. Using his exceptional observational and memory skills, the painter later recreated the scene of that ni …
